T50004.name: Reversal
T50004.effect: [Instant] Each stack restores 1 HP to allies or deals 1 HP loss to enemies.

T50005.name: Cleanse
T50005.effect: [Instant] Each stack removes 2 stacks of all debuffs from allies or 2 stacks of all buffs from enemies.

T50003.name: Inspire
T50003.effect: [Instant] Each stack grants the target 1 Mana.

T50002.name: Decay
T50002.effect: [Instant] Each stack drains 1 Mana from the target.

T10006.name: Fear
T10006.effect: [Instant] Each stack drains 1 Toughness from the target.

T20016.name: Fortitude
T20016.effect: [Instant] Each stack grants the target 1 Toughness.

T20003.name: Haste
T20003.effect: [Buff] Each stack grants the target 1 SPD. Persistent effect.

T20005.name: Bloodlust
T20005.effect: [Buff] Each stack increases total DMG dealt by 1. Applies to each hit in multi-hit attacks and scales per target based on DMG dealt. Consumed after taking effect.

T20006.name: Shield
T20006.effect: [Buff] Each stack reduces total DMG taken by 1. Applies to each hit in multi-hit attacks. Consumed after taking effect.

T10008.name: Precision
T10008.effect: [Buff] Every 5 stacks increase Follow-Up DMG by 1. Target prioritizes attacking back position. Persistent effect.

T20008.name: Faith
T20008.effect: [Buff] Every 5 stacks on the unit increases their total HP restored to other targets by 1. Persistent.

T20011.name: Growth
T20011.effect: [Buff] Each stack increases Max HP by 1. Persistent effect.

T20007.name: Regen
T20007.effect: [Buff] Each stack restores 1 HP at action end. Max stacks per trigger: 10% of target's Max HP. Consumed on trigger.

T30001.name: Soothe
T30001.effect: [Buff] Each stack reduces HP loss by 1. Consumed after taking effect.

T20009.name: Thorns
T20009.effect: [CN: 【正面】每层使攻击目标失去1点生命],[CN: 每次生效层数最多不超过目标10%生命上限],[CN: 多段攻击只生效1次],[CN: 持续生效。]

T10001.name: Stun
T10001.effect: [Debuff] Each stack reduces DEF by 1. Target cannot act. Lasts 1 turn.

T10009.name: Taunt
T10009.effect: [Debuff] Every 5 stacks increase the target's Counter DMG taken by 1. The front position will be prioritized as the target for this debuff. Persistent effect.

T40006.name: Slow
T40006.effect: [Debuff] Each stack reduces SPD by 1. Persistent effect.

T40007.name: Vulnerable
T40007.effect: [Debuff] Each stack increases total DMG taken by 1. Applies to each hit in multi-hit attacks. Consumed after taking effect.

T40004.name: Chill
T40004.effect: [Debuff] Each stack reduces the target's total DMG by 1. Applies to each hit of multi-hit attacks. When affecting multiple targets, each target is affected separately based on DMG. Consumed after taking effect.

T40002.name: Hinder
T40002.effect: [Debuff] Each stack reduces the target's total HP restored and HP Gain by 1. Applies to each instance of multi-heal effects. Consumed after taking effect.

T40001.name: Expose
T40001.effect: [Debuff] Each stack reduces Max HP by 1 at action end. Max stacks per trigger: 10% of target's Max HP. Persistent.

T40003.name: Burn
T40003.effect: [Debuff] Each stack causes 1 HP loss at action start. Max stacks per trigger: 10% of target's Max HP. Persistent.

T40005.name: Shock
T40005.effect: [Debuff] Each stack reduces Mana gained by 1, up to 20% of Max Mana per instance. Consumed after taking effect.
